programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Festive rom com with Alicia Leigh Willis. Years after they last dated, widowed Abby and ex gridiron star Ben reunite at the Greenbrier. Will their romance kick off again this Christmas season? (2022)
Work acholic Lauren goes on a retreat to disconnect from work and reconnect to nature. Will handsome ranch owner Jack help Lauren let loss and realise the importance of a work-life balance? (2021)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Each year Sarah builds her "Snow Beau" snowman with her best friend Nick. After another breakup, she begins to wonder if she'll ever find her own true love. (2017)
